body:0001.source: This article is machine translated from english
body:0001.target: This article is machine translated from english

body:0003.source: FormSync bridges the gap between offline participation and your digital platform. Imagine running a workshop, handing out printed surveys, or collecting handwritten ideas at a community event. With FormSync, those paper responses don’t stay stuck on paper.
body:0003.target: FormSync bridges the gap between offline participation and your digital platform. Imagine running a workshop, handing out printed surveys, or collecting handwritten ideas at a community event. With FormSync, those paper responses don’t stay stuck on paper.

body:0005.source: Generate a printable PDF version of your survey or ideation form
body:0005.target: Generate a printable PDF version of your survey or ideation form

body:0006.source: Distribute it offline: at meetings, events or door-to-door
body:0006.target: Distribute it offline: at meetings, events or door-to-door

body:0008.source: Import them back into your platform using OCR (optical character recognition) or via an Excel template
body:0008.target: Import them back into your platform using OCR (optical character recognition) or via an Excel template

body:0009.source: The system reads responses, matches them to the original form, and lets you review and approve them before they appear online. That way, insights from residents who prefer pen and paper are captured alongside digital contributions, ensuring no voice is left out.
body:0009.target: The system reads responses, matches them to the original form, and lets you review and approve them before they appear online. That way, insights from residents who prefer pen and paper are captured alongside digital contributions, ensuring no voice is left out.

body:0010.source: ℹ️ Availability depends on your subscription plan.
body:0010.target: ℹ️ Availability depends on your subscription plan.

body:0011.source: How to create a downloadable PDF?
body:0011.target: How to create a downloadable PDF?

body:0012.source: Create a Survey or Collect input and feedback phase
body:0012.target: Create a Survey or Collect input and feedback phase

body:0013.source: Build the form in Edit survey or Edit input form
body:0013.target: Build the form in Edit survey or Edit input form

body:0014.source: (Optional for survey) Enable Collect demographic questions by adding a new page to the end of the survey in Phase → Phase access and user data → Demographic questions asked to users to place registration questions on the last PDF page
body:0014.target: (Optional for survey) Enable Collect demographic questions by adding a new page to the end of the survey in Phase → Phase access and user data → Demographic questions asked to users to place registration questions on the last PDF page

body:0016.source: (Optional) Customize front and last page of the PDF template
body:0016.target: (Optional) Customize front and last page of the PDF template

body:0017.source: ⚠️ After downloading, do not change the online form or the PDF; they must remain identical for import.
body:0017.target: ⚠️ After downloading, do not change the online form or the PDF; they must remain identical for import.

body:0018.source: How to upload a PDF via FormSync?
body:0018.target: How to upload a PDF via FormSync?

body:0020.source: In Input Importer, click Import → Click to select a file
body:0020.target: In Input Importer, click Import → Click to select a file

body:0021.source: Choose Paper forms OCR (one language per upload) and select the correct language
body:0021.target: Choose Paper forms OCR (one language per upload) and select the correct language

body:0022.source: Make sure to toggle This file contains multiple scanned forms if your PDF contains multiple surveys and add the number of pages per single input
body:0022.target: Make sure to toggle This file contains multiple scanned forms if your PDF contains multiple surveys and add the number of pages per single input

body:0023.source: Make sure to toggle The uploaded form was created with the "Personal data" section if your survey contained demographic questions
body:0023.target: Make sure to toggle The uploaded form was created with the "Personal data" section if your survey contained demographic questions

body:0024.source: Wait for processing; items appear in the left panel.
body:0024.target: Wait for processing; items appear in the left panel.

body:0027.source: Scan with a scanner or scanning app (not camera), same page size, ≤ 100 pages per upload.
body:0027.target: Scan with a scanner or scanning app (not camera), same page size, ≤ 100 pages per upload.

body:0028.source: Exclude responses that deviate from the question format (e.g., handwritten notes next to MCQ).
body:0028.target: Exclude responses that deviate from the question format (e.g., handwritten notes next to MCQ).

body:0029.source: How to review and approve imports? (see video above)
body:0029.target: How to review and approve imports? (see video above)

body:0030.source: In Input Importer, select a response (left).
body:0030.target: In Input Importer, select a response (left).

body:0031.source: Review parsed answers (middle) and the scanned PDF preview (right, for OCR uploads).
body:0031.target: Review parsed answers (middle) and the scanned PDF preview (right, for OCR uploads).

body:0032.source: Adjust email and User consent if needed.
body:0032.target: Adjust email and User consent if needed.

body:0033.source: Click Approve to finalize; proceed to the next item.
body:0033.target: Click Approve to finalize; proceed to the next item.

body:0034.source: Approved ideas/inputs are created on the platform and tagged imported.
body:0034.target: Approved ideas/inputs are created on the platform and tagged imported.

body:0037.source: Supported (PDF download): All question types can be printed.
body:0037.target: Supported (PDF download): All question types can be printed.

body:0038.source: Supported (PDF upload/import): Be aware that while all survey questions types can be downloaded as PDF not all survey question types can be imported back using our scanning technology. The following question types are not yet supported for import:
body:0038.target: Supported (PDF upload/import): Be aware that while all survey questions types can be downloaded as PDF not all survey question types can be imported back using our scanning technology. The following question types are not yet supported for import:

body:0039.source: Mapping questions (Drop Pin, Draw Route, Draw Area, ESRI file upload)
body:0039.target: Mapping questions (Drop Pin, Draw Route, Draw Area, ESRI file upload)

body:0041.source: If your PDF survey template includes these questions, when you upload the template back these question types will be uploaded back as "no answer"
body:0041.target: If your PDF survey template includes these questions, when you upload the template back these question types will be uploaded back as "no answer"

body:0043.source: To avoid errors during upload, please ensure the following:
body:0043.target: To avoid errors during upload, please ensure the following:

body:0044.source: Use the unaltered platform PDF template (no layout edits)
body:0044.target: Use the unaltered platform PDF template (no layout edits)

body:0045.source: Keep online form unchanged after PDF generation
body:0045.target: Keep online form unchanged after PDF generation

body:0046.source: Scan pages with consistent size and adequate contrast
body:0046.target: Scan pages with consistent size and adequate contrast
